items.description:
1. Ceviche, toasted corn and boniato
2. Ham croquettes

items.name: STARTERS - TO SHARE -
items.description:
1. Steamed Valencian clams (clotxina)
2. Tempura bravas potatoes

items.name: MAIN COURSE - CHOOSE -
items.description:
1. Cheek rice with piquillo peppers (min. 2 pax)
2. Confit cod with esgarradet and kalamata emulsion
3. Pork in sauce with patatas al montón and pickled pepper emulsion

items.name: DESSERT - CHOOSE -
items.description:
1. Brownie with yogurt ice cream and nocilla dust
2. Roasted pineapple with caramel ice cream
3. Seasonal fruit

items.name: LA DÁRSENA
items.description:
**Aperitif**
Truffled almonds and toasted bread basket with alioli and tomato.

**Starter to share**
Fried baby squid with free-range egg.

**Individual starter**
Ensaladilla marinera with fresh shrimp.

**Main**
Pork belly and pumpkin rice with baby artichokes.

**Dessert**
Homemade cheesecake with strawberry essence.

items.name: DOCK
items.description:
**Centre-table starter**
Tricolour sweet tomato with burrata, citrus basil pesto and caramelised pepper.
Sea bass ceviche with purple onion, boniato, crystal prawn and ají amarillo.

**Individual starter**
Ensaladilla marinera toast with tuna belly, anchovy and pepper.

**Main course to choose**
Meloso of squid and artichoke
Grilled corvina with boniato cream
Picaña with roast potatoes, mangetout and chimichurri.

**Dessert**
Caramelised torrija with forest fruits and milk meringue ice cream.

items.name: ALTAMAR
items.description:
**Centre-table starter**
1. Beef steak tartare with crispy potatoes and artisan toast
2. White prawns in garlic.

**Individual starter**
Grilled artichoke with roasted pepper sauce and hazelnut.

**Main course to choose**
Meloso of free-range chicken with mushrooms and spring onions
Grilled corvina with teriyaki vegetables
Iberian cheeks with creamy truffle potato.

**Dessert**
Cheesecake with strawberry essence.
Includes one drink.

notes: Artisan bread available: regular, wholemeal or gluten-free
Chef's weekly menu available Monday to Friday, 1 PM - 4 PM
Please ask for prices on market-fresh products
Valencian culinary terms (esmorzaret, titaina, coca de dacsa, senyoret, esgarraet, clotxina, turrón, torrija, tocino de cielo) are kept in their original language to preserve their cultural identity
